key_points: Spurs target a 3‑1 series advantage over the Blazers.
Victor Wembanyama’s health remains uncertain ahead of the game.
Winning the matchup would give San Antonio momentum heading into the later rounds.

key_points: Thunder lead series 3‑0 and look to finish with a sweep.
Betting line lists Oklahoma City as -10.5 favorites.

key_points: Timberwolves hold a 3‑1 series advantage over Denver.
Nuggets are favored by 10.5 points despite trailing.
A win would give Minnesota a trip to the conference semifinals.

articles.title: Knicks Notes: Hart ‘Locked In’ Defensively, Anunoby Shines in Win Over Hawks
articles.original_title: Knicks Notes: Josh Hart 'locked in' defensively, OG Anunoby strong on both ends in win over Hawks
articles.summary: In a do‑or‑die Game 4 victory, New York Knicks guard Josh Hart delivered a standout defensive performance, while forward OG Anunoby contributed effectively on both ends of the floor. The notes highlight the key factors that propelled the Knicks past the Atlanta Hawks.
key_points: Josh Hart’s defensive intensity was a major factor in the win.
OG Anunoby provided strong two‑way play, impacting scoring and defense.
The performance helped the Knicks survive a must‑win situation.

articles.title: Knicks ride Karl-Anthony Towns’ rare triple-double to crucial Game 4 victory
articles.original_title: Knicks ride Karl-Anthony Towns’ rare triple-double to crucial Game 4 victory
articles.summary: Karl-Anthony Towns has long been known as one of the NBA's best-shooting big men.  On Saturday night, he showed he can be a pretty good passer, too.  Towns had the fifth triple-double in his 11-year career and first in the playoffs, leading the New York Knicks to a 114-98 win over the Atlanta Hawks to tie the first-round playoff series at two wins apiece.

articles.title: Jaden McDaniels angers the Nuggets again with a late layup that triggers shoving from Jokic
articles.original_title: Jaden McDaniels angers the Nuggets again with a late layup that triggers shoving from Jokic
articles.summary: The Denver-Minnesota rivalry took another dramatic turn in the closing seconds of Game 4 on Saturday, when Nuggets star Nikola Jokic confronted Jaden McDaniels after he took an uncontested layup with the Timberwolves on the way to victory and a 3-1 lead in the first-round NBA playoff series.  After McDaniels made the unsportsmanlike basket with 2.1 seconds left with the Nuggets having conceded the 112-96 decision, Jokic ran from one end of the court to the other to shove him. articles.title: Shannon Sharpe Defends LeBron as Lakers Lead Series 3-0
articles.original_title: “Where’s that crowd that says I can’t do it?”- Shannon Sharpe calls out LeBron James’ critics as the Lakers take a 3-0 lead - Basketball Network
articles.summary: During a post‑game interview, Shannon Sharpe challenged critics of LeBron James, asking "Where’s that crowd that says I can’t do it?" as the Los Angeles Lakers took a 3‑0 series lead. Sharpe highlighted James' leadership and the team's performance while urging detractors to respect the veteran's impact.
key_points: Sharpe publicly defended LeBron against recent criticism.
Lakers secured a commanding 3‑0 advantage in the series.
The comments underscored the media scrutiny surrounding James' age and durability.

articles.title: Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves Return to Lakers Practice
articles.original_title: Luka Doncic & Austin Reaves BACK At Lakers Practice! | + Update From JJ Redick! (TR5BvTe4sV) - fathomjournal.org
articles.summary: Both Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves were spotted back on the Los Angeles Lakers' practice floor after missing previous sessions due to minor injuries. JJ Redick provided an update, noting the duo appeared healthy and were working on offensive sets ahead of the upcoming games.
key_points: Doncic and Reaves rejoined practice, signaling readiness for the next stretch.
Redick highlighted their focus on shooting and defensive communication.
Their return comes as the Lakers aim to maintain momentum in the season.

key_points: Doncic sidelined with an ankle injury for Game 4.
Lakers must adjust rotations and rely more on role players.
The Rockets gain a strategic advantage with Doncic out.

articles.title: Rich Paul Urges Lakers to Show More Gratitude to LeBron
articles.original_title: Rich Paul Says Lakers Need To Be More Grateful For LeBron - heavy.com
articles.summary: NBA agent Rich Paul commented that the Los Angeles Lakers organization and its fan base should express greater appreciation for LeBron James' contributions, both on and off the court. Paul emphasized James' leadership, mentorship of younger players, and his role in keeping the franchise competitive.
key_points: Paul called for increased acknowledgment of LeBron's impact.
He highlighted James' mentorship of emerging talent.
The statement came amid ongoing discussions about the team's direction.

articles.title: ESPN Examines LeBron James' Unusual Weakness: His Love for Bojangles
articles.original_title: Evaluating LeBron James' one weakness: His love for Bojangles - ESPN
articles.summary: An ESPN feature humorously explored LeBron James' fondness for Bojangles' fried chicken as a light‑hearted "weakness" in his otherwise disciplined routine. The piece noted how the star balances his dietary preferences with his rigorous training regimen.
key_points: James' preference for Bojangles was highlighted as a playful anecdote.
The article discussed how he integrates indulgences into his nutrition plan.
It underscored James' ability to maintain performance despite occasional cravings.

articles.title: LeBron and Bronny James Share Father‑Son Moments in Game 3 Victory
articles.original_title: Lakers’ LeBron James, Bronny James create father-son memories in Game 3 win - Orange County Register
articles.summary: In Game 3 of the Lakers’ playoff series, LeBron James and his son Bronny James both saw significant playing time, creating memorable father‑son moments on the court. The win helped the Lakers take a series lead while highlighting Bronny’s growing role with the team.
key_points: LeBron logged 30 minutes and 22 points; Bronny contributed 5 points and 3 rebounds in limited minutes.
The duo’s on‑court chemistry was highlighted by a shared high‑five and a brief bench celebration.
The victory gave the Lakers a 2‑1 series edge and underscored Bronny’s progress as a rookie.

articles.title: LeBron Calls Out Rockets for ‘Disrespect’ Toward Bronny After Playoff Win
articles.original_title: LeBron James Criticizes Rockets for ‘Disrespect’ Surrounding Son Bronny After Playoff Win - Us Weekly
articles.summary: Following the Lakers’ playoff triumph, LeBron James publicly criticized the Houston Rockets for comments he deemed disrespectful toward his son Bronny. LeBron emphasized that his family deserves respect regardless of on‑court performance.
key_points: LeBron said the Rockets’ social‑media jokes about Bronny’s rookie status were inappropriate.
He defended Bronny’s work ethic and highlighted his contributions to the Lakers’ win.
The remarks sparked a brief social‑media exchange between the Lakers and Rockets organizations.

articles.title: LeBron James Explains How He Saves Energy for Crunch Time
articles.original_title: LeBron James Discusses How He Is Able To Conserve Energy For Crunch Time - Lakers Nation
articles.summary: In an interview with Lakers Nation, LeBron James detailed the conditioning and pacing strategies he uses to remain effective in the final minutes of games. He cited a mix of veteran experience, in‑game breathing techniques, and selective exertion throughout the night.
key_points: LeBron focuses on a steady tempo early in games, reserving bursts of intensity for the fourth quarter.
He incorporates specific recovery drills and nutrition protocols during games and practices.
The approach has helped him maintain high efficiency in clutch situations despite his age.

articles.title: LeBron James’ Sex Comedy Set for Netflix Release
articles.original_title: LeBron James’ Sex Comedy Sets Netflix Streaming Date - ComingSoon.net
articles.summary: LeBron James’ upcoming comedy film, a sex‑focused satire, has received a streaming release date on Netflix. The project marks another entertainment venture for the NBA star beyond his on‑court career.
key_points: The film, produced by James’ SpringHill Company, is scheduled to stream on Netflix in late summer 2026.
James serves as an executive producer and makes a cameo appearance.
The comedy follows a group of friends navigating modern dating mishaps.

articles.title: Signs Indicate LeBron James May Be Approaching End of Elite Career
articles.original_title: LeBron James shows the latest sign that he is near the end of his brilliant career - MARCA
articles.summary: MARCA reports that recent performance metrics and playing minutes suggest LeBron James is showing signs of natural decline after a brilliant career. While still productive, subtle reductions in speed and stamina are being noted by analysts.
key_points: Advanced stats show a slight dip in LeBron’s per‑36‑minute scoring and defensive ratings.
His average minutes per game have decreased to 33 from a peak of 38 earlier in his career.
Despite the decline, he remains a top‑10 player and a key leader for the Lakers.
